name: morkit-codex
description: Mor's all-in-one toolkit for OpenAI Codex CLI — spec workflow (propose/review/archive) + brainstorming/execute/TDD skills + 5-specialist deep code review + BrSE document generation. Codex-native variant of morkit (see plugins/morkit/ for the Claude Code variant). Skills + commands use Codex-friendly vocab; hooks gate uses apply_patch|Edit|Write matcher.

interface.shortDescription: Spec workflow + deep code review + BrSE document generation for Codex CLI
interface.longDescription: All-in-one Codex CLI toolkit. Consolidates: spec workflow (propose/review/archive) + brainstorming/writing-plans/executing-plans/TDD/subagent-driven-development skills + 5-specialist parallel code review (deep-review) + BrSE document generation (docs-hero — SRS/API/DB/architecture). Single /morkit:* namespace via AGENTS.md bridge. Vocab-translated from the Claude Code variant (plugins/morkit/) via deterministic sync — see plugins/morkit/codex/vocab-map.yaml. INSTALL: codex plugin marketplace add mor-duongmh/claude-plugins, then install plugin 'morkit-codex'.
defaultPrompt: Bắt đầu propose spec change mới cho feature X
Chạy deep-review cho diff hiện tại
Generate SRS/API docs cho project này
